html:
Exclusive to:

The House Expansion Permit is a craftable Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Renovate Tab and requires 50 Oincs to obtain. It can also be bought at the Swinesbury City Hall for 50 Oincs.

By using the House Expansion Permit on a locked Door in the Slanty Shanty, one is able to construct an adjacent empty room. Locked Doors in other rooms will automatically connect to the new room as well if they are facing in the right direction. The House Expansion Permit is consumed in the process. Constructed rooms can be removed from the Slanty Shanty again by using a Demolition Permit.

Trivia

  • The House Expansion Permit can also be crafted using 5 Tenpiece Oincs or 1 Centapiece Oinc. If using Centapiece Oinc, one will be returned 5 Tenpiece Oincs.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

“My new lab awaits!”
–Wilson
“More rooms mean more room for fires.”
–Willow
“Paper says Wolfgang can build mighty extension!”
–Wolfgang
“Now I can build a mourning room.”
–Wendy
“FLESH SACK BUREAUCRACY ACQUIRED”
–WX-78
“For a new wing to my library.”
–Wickerbottom
“Well. Better get building.”
–Woodie
“More room for my acquisitions.”
–Maxwell
“Ah yes! Now I can expand my workshop!”
–Wagstaff
“Anöther rööm is mine för the taking!”
–Wigfrid
“Cool! What should we put in our other room?”
–Webber
“Cool! I can make a bedroom.”
–Walani
“More room to cook.”
–Warly
“Fer buildin' on ta me land ship.”
–Woodlegs
“FOR THE UNDISCOVER'D PANTRY”
–Wilba
“Build rooms?”
–Wormwood
“Now I can have one room to live in, and one room for all my things.”
–Wheeler
The House Expansion Permit is a craftable Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Renovate Tab and requires 50 Oincs to obtain. It can also be bought at the Swinesbury City Hall for 50 Oincs.
By using the House Expansion Permit on a locked Door in the Slanty Shanty, one is able to construct an adjacent empty room. Locked Doors in other rooms will automatically connect to the new room as well if they are facing in the right direction. The House Expansion Permit is consumed in the process. Constructed rooms can be removed from the Slanty Shanty again by using a Demolition Permit.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The House Expansion Permit can also be crafted using 5 Tenpiece Oincs or 1 Centapiece Oinc. If using Centapiece Oinc, one will be returned 5 Tenpiece Oincs.

The '''House Expansion Permit''' is a craftable [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Renovate Tab]] and requires 50 [[Oinc]]s to obtain. It can also be bought at the [[Swinesbury City Hall]] for 50 Oincs.

By using the House Expansion Permit on a locked [[Doors Tab|Door]] in the [[Slanty Shanty]], one is able to construct an adjacent empty room. Locked Doors in other rooms will automatically connect to the new room as well if they are facing in the right direction. The House Expansion Permit is consumed in the process. Constructed rooms can be removed from the Slanty Shanty again by using a [[Demolition Permit]].

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The House Expansion Permit can also be crafted using 5 [[Oinc|Tenpiece Oinc]]s or 1 [[Centapiece Oinc]]. If using Centapiece Oinc, one will be returned 5 Tenpiece Oincs.
